lines: Good morning, Subject #47! Welcome to the PlayPen. Snack time is never.
Ah, you're awake. Orientation is self-guided. Mostly because the guide quit.
Left, right, jump. Even the sock puppet figured that out eventually.
The Spotter is nocturnal, diurnal, and extremely motivated. Do wave hello.
The Exit Wing! Named ironically, of course. No one exits. It's more of a theme.
Oh no. Anyway — you respawn. We recycle subjects here. Very eco-friendly.
You dropped your things back there. Litterbug.
That's coming out of your snack privileges. Which are zero. So.
I've seen worse. I'm legally required to say that.
The floor is not your friend. Nothing here is your friend.
Subject #46 lasted longer. And #46 was a mop.
Fascinating combination. Truly. Write that down and then throw it away.
That's not a recipe, that's a cry for help.
I love watching you do science.
You MADE something? Hm. Noting 'exhibits tool use' on your chart. Concerning.
You made a SOCK PUPPET? Oh, this is the best day of my career. He stays. Forever.
Standing still is technically an escape strategy. A bad one, but technically.
I can see you, you know. That's my whole job.
Hiding in the locker. Classic. The locker union thanks you for your business.
I'll pretend I don't know where you are. It's more fun for both of us.
Fraternizing with the other subjects? Fine. Friendship is just a slower escape.
Wait. WAIT. Who left the Exit Wing exit-able?! ...Enjoy the parking lot, #47. There's a second facility under it.
